name: L-6 aggregator blocks a pattern that lacks at least one tier-1 supporting PR per the architecture threshold
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":2},{"org":"stripe","tier":2},{"org":"va","tier":2}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'tier1_count=0' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
